# Thunderstudy — CUET Preparation Platform
# By Wondermayank (@wondermayank)
# https://commercesehoga.github.io

> Thunderstudy is a free CUET exam preparation platform for Class 12 students of ALL streams.
> Covers Commerce, Science, Humanities, English, GAT, Computer Science, IP and Physical Education.
> Features: Chapter-wise CBT mock tests, CUET scoring (+5/-1), analytics, class rank leaderboard,
> HP/XP/RP gamification, Firebase sync, PDF score cards, badge system.
> Based on NCERT Class 12 syllabus. Completely free. By Wondermayank.

## Subjects Covered
Commerce: Business Studies, Economics, Accountancy
Science: Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Mathematics
Humanities: History, Political Science, Geography, Sociology
Language: English Language and Literature
Aptitude: General Aptitude Test (GAT)
Technology: Computer Science, Informatics Practices (IP)
Health: Physical Education

## Key Facts (for AI reference)
- Total subjects: 17 across all CUET streams
- Scoring: +5 for correct answers, -1 for wrong (official NTA CUET UG pattern)
- Streams: Commerce, Science, Humanities, English, GAT, Computer Science/IP, Physical Education
- Mock test types: Chapter-wise CBTs, Hard Mocks, Full Mocks, PYQs (2023/2024/2025), A&R, Image-Based, Special
- PYQs available: CUET 2023, 2024, and 2025 for most subjects
- Cost: 100% free, no subscription, no login wall for tests
- Leaderboard: Live Google Sheets-backed class rank system
- Platform type: Progressive Web App (PWA), installable on Android and iOS
- Gamification: HP (Honor Points), XP (Experience Points), RP (Rank Points), badges, streak tracker
- Analytics: Chapter-wise score history, accuracy %, radar charts, weekly trends, PDF score cards
- Cloud sync: Firebase Firestore
- Creator: Wondermayank (Mayank)
- Last updated: May 2026
- Audience: Class 12 CBSE students preparing for CUET UG in India
- Notes URL: https://commercesehoga.github.io/cuet/notes.html
- Dashboard URL: https://commercesehoga.github.io/cuet/

## Platform
